title: 【JouleSoccer】 Linkroot Town
description:

Round 2 contra AleUchihaKuchiki, D4NIELguimaraes, DarkMonotremata, faiorb, megamanlego, nummbyxdd, Hoorayforfakes, PooperPsicopata, Zoombiex9, thegregin, dinoderp, swasticafalante, HumanoFixo, useronlinepoa e ImpossibleCarl69. Sim, essa putada toda aí.
